notes: hybrid_mock uses the deterministic mock provider; it is a regression setting, not evidence of LLM gain.
The main planning matrix uses a fixed Zurich-shaped reference fixture. Live WFS retrieval is reported only as a dated case study.
Ollama profiling was not requested; reported profiling results are deterministic.

case_results.selected_route_name: Boundary route with stairs and no registered alternative
alerts: Route includes stairs and no step-free alternative was available in fixture data.
High alert: this step includes stairs.
directions: Step 1: Walk 250m to Central Station Exit B. (250m, about 4 min).
Step 2: Take stairs up to Platform Bridge. (80m, about 3 min).
Step 3: Listen for platform announcements before boarding Bus 9. (500m, about 7 min).
Step 4: Walk 370m to City Hall main entrance. (370m, about 4 min).

case_results.selected_route_name: Boundary step-free route with audio cue
directions: Step 1: Go 300m to Elevator Lobby at Central Station. (300m, about 5 min).
Step 2: Move to the same stop and check electronic display boards for Bus 9 updates (20m, about 2 min).
Step 3: Continue 760m on flat sidewalk to Bus Stop C. (760m, about 12 min).
Step 4: Go 370m to City Hall easy access entrance. (370m, about 5 min).

case_results.selected_route_name: Boundary step-free route with visual-only signage
directions: Step 1: Go 300m to Elevator Lobby at Central Station. (300m, about 5 min). Landmark: Elevator Lobby.
Step 2: Use elevator to street level. (20m, about 2 min).
Step 3: Use nearby staff, tactile cues, or the route text to confirm Green overhead sign (760m, about 12 min). Landmark: Green overhead sign.
Step 4: Go 370m to City Hall accessible entrance. (370m, about 5 min). Landmark: Accessible entrance.

Step 3: Walk 900m to destination plaza. (900m, about 13 min).
